name: Seafood Butter Sauce and Baste
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add dried rosemary, dried tarragon, salt, and lemon juice to the melted butter.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Brush the sauce onto seafood before grilling or cooking.
5. Baste the seafood occasionally during the grilling process.
6. The sauce can also be served warm as a dipping sauce with shrimp, crawfish, crab, and lobster.
